==Blog Links==
Hi friends hope you heard that our PLUS is making a home page.We wish to have some links in the home page.So tell you blog/home page and let all of us knows them

* Praveen A               http://pravi.co.nr/
* Hiran V                 http://hiraneffects.blogspot.com
* Riyaz Usman             http://riyaz.bitinc.co.in
* Anivar A                http://anivar.livejournal.com/
* Baiju M                 http://baijum81.livejournal.com/
* Niranjan Manjunath      http://web.archive.org/20060110094316/nirublogs.blogspot.com/
* Sujith Haridasan        http://sujith-h.livejournal.com/
